message:
fix(daemon,ballast): resolve production reclaim failure (bd-2iby)

Fix two root causes of the production disk-full incident where sbh
reported red pressure but performed zero effective reclaim:

1. Scanner channel capacity was 0 (rendezvous), causing try_send() to
   always fail under I/O pressure. Changed to bounded(2) to allow one
   buffered request while scanner processes another. This matches the
   existing comment on the send site.

2. Ballast inventory reported files_total from on-disk inventory count
   instead of configured file_count. When provisioning hadn't run,
   this showed 0/0 instead of 0/N, hiding the real state from operators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -323,7 +323,7 @@ impl BallastPoolCoordinator {
                 fs_type: pool.fs_type.clone(),
                 strategy: pool.strategy,
                 files_available: pool.available_count(),
-                files_total: pool.manager.inventory().len(),
+                files_total: pool.expected_count(),
                 releasable_bytes: pool.releasable_bytes(),
                 skipped: false,
                 skip_reason: None,
